action: Implement and verify a deterministic repository-tree enumerator and reducer for continuity-owned queue state.

handoff_chain: Materialize a deterministic continuity-owned current view
selected_from.selection_reason: No active continuity-owned canonical item remained; M-005 identified repository-tree enumeration as the highest-priority unresolved handoff.

memory_recovered: The current continuity view can be made discovery-complete for an immutable repository snapshot by requiring a non-truncated recursive tree and successful fetch and parse of every enumerated queue-update JSON document before reduction.

contradictions_resolved.apparent_conflict: The prior current-view manifest looked deterministic but could not prove that all continuity updates had been discovered.
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Determinism and completeness are separate properties. The new reducer preserves deterministic ordering while making completeness conditional on a non-truncated tree and one-to-one enumeration/fetch coverage.
contradictions_resolved.remaining_unresolved: A live recursive GitHub tree was not available through the connector in this run, so the contract is implemented and tested but not yet executed against the complete present repository tree.

inferred: tree completeness plus full fetch coverage closes the discovery gap for that immutable tree snapshot
proposed: add a GitHub Actions job that obtains the recursive tree, runs this reducer, and commits or uploads the derived manifest
superseded: curated replay lists as sufficient proof of completeness
unresolved: live full-tree execution and immutable generated manifest

verification.method: Node.js built-in test runner against byte-identical committed contents

privacy_boundary: Only repository paths, public queue metadata, commit identifiers, and abstract continuity claims were retained. Raw private chat, health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
next_action: Add a CI adapter that requests the repository's recursive Git tree at an immutable commit, feeds every enumerated queue-update document to the reducer, and emits a tree-SHA-bound current-view manifest.
